location: In a chest at the bottom of the first lava-and-chariot obstacle inside Gelmir Hero's Grave, Mt. Gelmir — go down the slope and use the side rooms to avoid the rolling chariot.
tactics: A rolling chariot patrols the lava corridor — duck into the side rooms rather than trying to outrun it in the open.
This chest comes early in the dungeon, before the Chariot boss room and a later Black Knife Assassin invader deeper in.
It's a Walking Mausoleum-style puzzle dungeon; Torrent's double jump helps on the pressure-plate sections if you get stuck.
lore: A bludgeon made from a single enormous finger, wrapped in heavy rings and apparently severed from some ancestor of the Fingercreepers — unsettlingly, it's said to still carry a trace of warmth from whatever blasphemy created it.

builds.name: Fixed-Skill Burst Damage
builds.why: Cannot be infused with an Ash of War, but its innate Claw Flick skill delivers a big single hit — good for a quality build that just wants a strong panic-button attack.
